entry.title: New IDC V797P6019B awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY for the amount of $100

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: "Orders of $50,000 or less for upgrades and accessories may be placed directly to the contractor by any Federal agency. Orders for complete systems, and any order exceeding $50,000 can only be placed by the VA National Acquisition Center."

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: DIAGNOSTIC X-RAY, ULTRASOUND, NUCLEAR MEDICINE, CT AND MRI.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: X-RAY EQ SUPPLIES - MED, DENTAL & V

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
